raw_consumer_statement: I closed my Citi double cash card beginning of XXXX and did this over the phone and requested if there was a balance and they said no. I cut the card up which I had for years and never have been a payment late with any of my accounts I had until I went to check on my XXXX score and found that it reported that I was reported as 30days late. I immediately called Citibank which at that time I did not understand what the girl was saying so I filed a dispute with XXXX and also requested to speak to someone about the dispute at Citibank. I was asked numerous times for my FULL s.s. number and I would not give them my full number. They asked my address I gave them my previous address and my new address ( sold my home XX/XX/XXXX and bought new home same day ). I also gave them my security word for my act and my phone number which I have had for at least XXXX yrs and my old number but they could not or did not want to verify my acct number.. I was put on hold for 45 mins then disconnected. I filed a dispute with XXXX and need received a phone call or anything except today I received a email saying it was remaining on my report. This is not right. I also contacted Citibank again today about issue and they still would not connect me to fraud dept. They gave me a number and that number is not Citibank. XXXX has same number listed too. I have always has a XXXX and up score. So today I paid the balance that was as they said XXXX in XXXX to XXXX as of today cause they have done enough damage to my credit report. I don't think its fair that I asked them if I had any pending charges or balance at time of closing and then not to be contacted by phone or mail since XXXX when the unrecognized charges were made if I was contacted I would have paid them on time had I was told what the charges were but I have not been told from Citi bank nor XXXX. This to me is un professional. No response from Citibank even requesting thru the mail since filing dispute but in the meantime I am marked as 30days late for 2 months and have been charged late fees and interest even since dispute. Please help me with this. I have even been rude with them. Thank you XXXX
